in_scope: AI Agent Service Provider Search & Matching
Action Items Workflow Management (System of Action)
out_of_scope: Field Service Engine MVP features (Phase 2 Focus)
Full offline-first capabilities for Homeowners (Secondary priority)
Legacy Vantaca integration for V1 (Replicate 'System of Action' only)
Advanced AI extraction beyond CC&Rs/Bylaws for V1
Direct Contractor Portal Access for V1

external_systems.name: Communication Provider (Email/SMS)
external_systems.purpose: Delivery of statutory notices and mass alerts per US-006/007

external_systems.name: Government Regulatory Services
external_systems.purpose: Permit/BLDS lookup and integration for ARC domain per REC-ASS-008

external_systems.name: AI/ML Service Provider
external_systems.purpose: LLM/OCR services for property analysis and document extraction per US-001/004
